layers.name: Test Layer
layers.description: Unit, mock, and end-to-end test code that validates behavior across core flows.

layers.name: Shared Layer
layers.description: Cross-cutting modules that do not map cleanly to a single architectural concern.

layers.name: UI Layer
layers.description: Next.js routes and reusable interface components that render the user-facing experience.

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.description: Application services, middleware, and integrations that implement business and request logic.

tour.title: Start at the Entry
tour.description: Begin with app/page.tsx to see how the application is bootstrapped. This file gives a high-level map of which modules are wired together first.
tour.languageLesson: In Next.js App Router projects, route files in app/ define rendering boundaries and composition points.

tour.title: Test Layer Focus
tour.description: Review this test layer to understand its core responsibility in the architecture. These files are representative anchors for how this layer interacts with the rest of the system.
